reason: Preseed self-test has a syntax error at line 879 — raw markdown text (`## Structured State Snapshot`) is left outside any string literal, between a comment stub for a test case that was never completed and a closing `"""` that opens nothing. `python3 scripts/preseed_session_plan.py --test` fails with `SyntaxError: invalid syntax`. The state_graph_tools test passes (59 OK), but the preseed test coverage for analysis-only pressure is syntactically broken and does not run.
